subcodes.first_line: The Shaykhu'l-Islam of Tiflis, in his own estimation, composed a learned refutation of this Cause, and manifest proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شیخ الاسلام تفلیس بخیال خویش رد نفیسی بر این امر تحریر نموده و برهان واضح
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
